HostSiteOps.Ops: SOpAttachHead SOpShadow SOpForwardCasterCenterInverted SOp2DRotation SOpMoveByDot3 SOpSplashDamagePositionVariance SOpRollCounterClockwise90
SOpAttachHead SOpShadow SOpForwardCasterCenterInverted SOp2DRotation SOpMoveByDot3 SOpSplashDamagePositionVariance SOpRollClockwise90

On.Send: AnimBracketStart Burrow Burrow IGNORE Unburrow ClosingFull,OpeningPlayForever,Instant
